Naseem Akhter

Content Writer | Updated on - Jun 24, 2026

Hindu College Latest Updates and News

29 Jun, 2026 DU CUET PG Cutoff 2026 has been released. Candidates can check the round and course-wise minimum allocation score here: Check Hindu College CUET PG Cutoff 2026.

  • Hindu College Round 2 MA Cutoff 2026 is 140-276 for the General Category.
  • For M.Sc, the General Category Round 2 Hindu College Cutoff 2026 is 115-202.
...Read More

Hindu College Cutoff 2026 for popular UG courses is expected to increase slightly by 5-15 marks compared to 2025. Below is a summary of the expected CUET UG cutoff and released CUET PG 2026 cutoffs of Hindu College for C1 UR category (C1 UR refers to the Unreserved/General Category for Non-DU Graduates):

CUET UG 2026 Expected Cutoff

  • BA (Hons.): Cutoff may increase from 480-951 in 2025 to 490-955 in 2026, driven by demand for popular courses (Economics, English, and Political Science)
  • B.Com (Hons.): Expected to rise slightly from 912 in 2025 to 915-925 in 2026
  • B.Sc (Hons.): Cutoff range may move from 538-849 in 2025 to 545-860 in 2026 (competitive science programs likely seeing increases)

CUET PG 2026 Cutoff Summary

Note: CUET UG 2026 results have been declared. Meanwhile, DU has released the minimum allocation scores for CUET PG 2026 Rounds 1 and 2.

Hindu College CUET UG Cutoff 2026 (Expected)

Based on the cutoff trend from 2022 to 2025, Hindu College witnessed a significant rise in Round 1 cutoffs in 2025.

Therefore, the following are the expected CUET cutoffs (Round 1) for Hindu College in 2026 for popular courses under the UR (General) category:

Hindu College Expected CUET Cutoff 2026 (Program-wise)

Program UR OBC SC ST EWS PwBD

Hindu College CUET Cutoff Trends

Admission at Hindu College in B.Sc (Hons.) program in 2025 was closed at 69 marks whereas closing marks in 2024 was 359 across all categories.

  • Admission in BA (Hons.) Programs in 2025 was closed at 119 marks whereas closing marks in 2024 was 719 across all categories.
  • Admission in B.Com (Hons.) Programs in 2025 was closed at 719 marks whereas closing marks in 2024 was 686 across all categories.

Hindu College CUET PG Cutoff 2026

DU has released the Round 1 and Round 2 CUET PG 2026 minimum allocation scores for Hindu College. MA programs recorded the highest cutoffs, with MA Political Science emerging as the most competitive course.

PG Cutoff 2026 Overview

  • Round 1
    • MA Political Science (276 marks)
    • M.Com (176 marks)
    • MSc Operational Research (211 marks)
  • Round 2
    • MA Political Science (276 marks)
    • M.Com (176 marks)
    • MSc Mathematics (192 marks)

Hindu College CUET PG Round 1 Cutoff 2026 (Program-wise)

Program UR OBC SC ST EWS
MA 165 - 276 106 - 265 85 - 266 247 - 276 149 - 268
M.Com 176 153 143 106 153
M.Sc 147 - 211 103 - 185 75 - 181 69 - 120 96 - 191

Hindu College CUET-PG Cutoff Trends

Admission at Hindu College in M.Sc Programs in 2026 was closed at 55 marks whereas closing marks in 2025 was 40 across all categories.

  • Admission in MA Programs in 2026 was closed at 85 marks whereas closing marks in 2025 was 62 across all categories.
  • Admission in M.Com Programs in 2026 was closed at 106 marks whereas closing marks in 2025 was 114 across all categories.

Hindu College Cutoff 2026 FAQs

Ques. What is the CUET cutoff 2026 for General category students at Hindu College?

Ans. The expected CUET 2026 cutoff for General (UR) category students at Hindu College is likely to range from 440 to 960 marks, depending on the course. Among the most competitive programs, BA (Hons.) Political Science is expected to close at 950–960 marks, followed by BA (Hons.) History (915–925 marks) and B.Com (Hons.) (910–920 marks). For Science courses, B.Sc (Hons.) Statistics and B.Sc (Hons.) Mathematics are expected to have cutoffs above 800 marks. These estimates are based on the 2025 Round 1 cutoffs and recent admission trends.

Ques. When will the Hindu College CUET UG cutoff 2026 be released?

Ans. The CUET UG 2026 cutoff lists are expected to be released during the CSAS allocation process in July 2026, after the declaration of CUET results.

Ques. Which course is expected to have the highest cutoff at Hindu College in 2026?

Ans. BA (Hons.) Political Science is expected to have the highest cutoff at Hindu College in 2026, with the UR cutoff likely to be around 950–960 marks. It is expected to be followed by BA (Hons.) History, whose cutoff may close at approximately 915–925 marks.

Ques. What is the CUET cutoff 2026 for OBC students at Hindu College?

Ans. The expected CUET 2026 cutoff for OBC (NCL) candidates at Hindu College is likely to range from 110 to 930 marks, depending on the course. Among the most competitive programs, BA (Hons.) Political Science is expected to close around 920–930 marks, followed by BA (Hons.) History (885–895 marks) and B.Com (Hons.) (840–850 marks). For Science courses, B.Sc (Hons.) Statistics and B.Sc (Hons.) Mathematics are expected to have cutoffs of approximately 730–745 marks and 710–725 marks, respectively. These estimates are based on 2025 cutoff trends and projected 2026 admission patterns.

Read More

Cutoff Summary: Hindu College

  • CUET
  • CUET PG

The CUET 2025 cutoff for admission to Hindu College for the General category ranges from 951 to 480 across various courses. For the highly sought-after BA (Hons.) Political Science, the Round 1 cutoff is 951, with the last round closing at 947. BA (Hons.) History recorded both a Round 1 and last round cutoff of 914. Other competitive courses such as B.Com (Hons.), BA (Hons.) Sociology, and BA (Hons.) Economics have cutoffs in the 912 to 888 range.

Courses with less competitive cutoffs, including B.Sc (Hons.) Physics, B.Sc (Hons.) Chemistry, and BA (Hons.) Sanskrit, show scores between 557 and 480. For the SC category, the Round 1 cutoff is 890 for BA (Hons.) Political Science, and the last round cutoff is 380 for B.Sc (Hons.) Chemistry. In the ST category, the range is 899 in Round 1 for BA (Hons.) Political Science to 152 in the last round for BA (Hons.) Sanskrit.

Under EWS, the admission cutoff is 921 in Round 1 for BA (Hons.) Political Science and 462 in the last round for B.Sc (Hons.) Chemistry.

Hindu College: 1 Answered Questions

What is the cutoff of Hindu College?

Swastika DeswalB.Sc. (Hons) Physics from Hindu College, University of Delhi (2019)

Hindu College is affiliated to the University of Delhi, It is one of the esteemed colleges in India. NIRF has ranked Hindu College 2nd in India. Hindu College offers both undergraduate and postgraduate courses. The required eligibility for admission into the undergraduate programs at Hindu College is 10+2 and selection to the program is based on the cutoff prepared by DU.

The cut off for various programs of Hindu College for the academic year 2019-20 is given below.
